            var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', location.href, true); xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.send('nitroBeaconUrl=aHR0cHM6Ly9leHRyZW1lY2hpY2tlbnMuY29tLw==&nitroBeaconCookies=W10=&nitroBeaconHash=31c0353e5b88d7dd7841bd836eb9c51e4450fca532cad04979859a44ef478b1953836136e1a01b3d9d6425429696dfecc3829fee78d1615d0e5ecf4dcac76518&proxyPurgeOnly=&layout=home');
